description: cluster.serve_weight → 1.5: Serve weight clustering is untested; increasing from 1.0 to 1.5 will amplify serve-pattern dominance in archetype formation, directly testing whether asymmetric serve emphasis can break through the persistent 0.2521 Brier plateau where 12 consecutive neutral/revert experiments across decay, confidence, and symmetric clustering suggest the bottleneck is serve-centric archetype geometry rather than individual feature signals.
